text: Moving from the glass-walled conference room into this striking exhibit space is like traversing between two realities. In the first scene, I felt myself observing from the threshold—part of the hum of collaboration but not fully inside. Now, basking in the glow of screens and bold letters, I feel a surge of curiosity and reflection. Here, among words and technological displays, I'm invited to contemplate the boundary between research and experience, between participation and observation. I feel inquisitive, almost like an explorer inside the possibilities of thought.
